host().details: Should return the `Host` address for the current chain. The `Host` is an immutable contract that will never change.

onGetTimeout((bytes,bytes,uint64,address.details: Called by the Host when a previously dispatched GET request has timed out. Override this method to handle GET timeout scenarios. The default implementation reverts.

onPostRequestTimeout((bytes,bytes,uint64.details: Called by the Host when a previously dispatched POST request has timed out. Override this method to implement cleanup or retry logic. The default implementation reverts.

onPostResponse((((bytes,bytes,uint64,byt.details: Called by the Host when a response is received for a previously dispatched POST request. Override this method to process response data. The default implementation reverts.

onPostResponseTimeout(((bytes,bytes,uint.details: Called by the Host when a POST response that was sent has timed out. Override this method to handle response timeout scenarios. The default implementation reverts.

quote(((bytes,bytes,uint64,bytes,bytes,u.details: returns the quoted fee in the feeToken for dispatching a POST response

quote((bytes,bytes,bytes,uint64,uint256,.details: returns the quoted fee in the feeToken for dispatching a POST request

quote((bytes,uint64,bytes[],uint64,uint2.details: returns the quoted fee in the feeToken for dispatching a GET request

quoteNative(((bytes,bytes,uint64,bytes,b.details: returns the quoted fee in the native token for dispatching a POST response

quoteNative((bytes,bytes,bytes,uint64,ui.details: returns the quoted fee in the native token for dispatching a POST request

quoteNative((bytes,uint64,bytes[],uint64.details: returns the quoted fee in the native token for dispatching a GET request
